name: Olive Garden Seafood Pasta Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Sort crab meat, removing any shell pieces.
3. Melt butter in a 3-quart non-aluminum saucepan.
4. Add mushrooms and sauté for 3 minutes.
5. Stir in the Newburg sauce mix.
6. Add milk, water, and wine; whisk well until mixture comes to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 5-8 minutes, stirring constantly.
8. Add green onions, pasta, and crab meat; stir to combine.
9. Heat through. Serve in bowls, garnished with chopped parsley.
